message:
fix: use git worktree move instead of os.Rename in repair path (GH#2056)

os.Rename breaks git worktrees because the .git file and worktree
registry gitdir still reference the old temp path. Use git worktree
move which properly updates all references.

Also strengthens verifyWorktreeExists to validate the gitdir reference
and run git rev-parse, catching broken worktrees at spawn time instead
of letting polecats start with non-functional git repos.
